title: Spike: Salesforce Reporting REST API Research
description:
Research spike to evaluate the Salesforce REST API capabilities for reports. The goal was to understand the extent of available functions so the team could assess feasibility for migration and operational reporting use cases.

Findings were documented in the Confluence page "Spike Reporting API Research" and notes from Slack discussions were consolidated there. The spike was completed and the original user story was pulled into the backlog for future implementation.
acceptance_criteria: Salesforce REST API report endpoints are documented with capabilities and limitations
Findings are consolidated in the Confluence knowledge base
Backlog item created for future reporting feature implementation
implementation_notes: Research spike only — no code changes. Results documented in Confluence under Spike Reporting API Research page.
comment_summary: Ryan marked the spike complete and consolidated Slack discussion notes into the Confluence page. The original user story was moved to the backlog for future work.
